title: 安田記念の後に・走りたくなるレース

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Did you watch me run?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Did you watch me run?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! It's only because I had so much fun running
with Grass! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And I'm just as happy to see how much she's
grown!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I can't stop thinking about the possibility of
running with her again in the future!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now, I wonder which race I should run in next to
show everyone what I've got.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are several choices, but she'll want a race
where she can enjoy competing against other
excellent runners...
choice_data_list: Let's go for the autumn Tenno Sho!
Let's go for the autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's a great idea! It's the perfect distance, and I
like Tokyo because it feels like home!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Radical! I can't wait to run in the fall Tenno!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, Grass! That was a great race!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes, it was a really good race...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But even though I tried my best, I couldn't catch
up to you.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I keep thinking about what I could have done
differently. It's terribly frustrating...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Still, when I look in your eyes now, I see your determination clear as day. In fact, it's growing.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I'm going to keep training and make
sure that one day, I'll be the one who wins.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. It's fun to help each other improve, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It sure is! I'm so glad you had a fun race too.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Since we enjoyed it so much, I'm sure the people
who were watching must have liked it as well.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
There may be people out there who are eager to
run with us right now!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! I'm looking forward to running against
them too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a great race with Grass Wonder,
Maruzensky's next target is the autumn Tenno
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
What a great race! I was cheering so hard I
thought I might lose my voice!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: I wish I could run in a race like that too!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I wish I could too!
